Off Calendar May-16-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Carlos Moran .
Attorney Paul Hogarth appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Brantley Donaldson is present.
Attorney Nathanad Player representing the defendant through full scope.

The Hon. Judge Karnow Curtis litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 608, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May-21-2012 is vacated. (D501)
